title: MC +
description: A great 1.21 Vanilla+ modpack designed to optimize Minecraft and add quality of life features while not being too invasive.
body:
# Summary
MC + is designed to maximize framerates while adding significant QOL improvements. It is a remix of my own Minecraft instance, so it should be good to go right away. This does however include some mods that may be called cheats such as Fullbright, increasing visibility in dark areas and WI Zoom, which zooms in up to 30x in any direction. I included these for convenience. Overall, I reccomend this to people who want to boost performance and add QOL mechanics while keeping most vanilla features untouched. It makes it so that you can play Minecraft Smoothly On Lower end PCs while making things like Shaders possible on Higher end PCs. 
## Highlights
- **Optimization** 
MC + Increases performance by multiple times, turning bad fps into over 120 FPS using Sodium Lithium, ModernFix, ImmediatelyFast and many more. **TO GET FULL PERFORMANCE BOOST, DISABLE VSYNC** although it might cause screen tearing.
- **Continuity** Adds connected textures to glass, bookshelves and more(You can add more using resource packs.)!
- **QOL** Mods like BetterF3, which as the name suggests cleans the F3 screen, AppleSkin for Hunger and Saturation, and Fullbright, which lets you see in dark areas are all great QOL mods that make playing easier and more enjoyable!
### Extras
Here are some things hat I think make Minecraft even better and go well with this modpack.
- [Fast Better Grass](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fast-better-grass)
- Faithful [64x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-64x) and [32x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-32x/gallery)
- Xaero's [Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) and [World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)

If you installed Faithful:
- [CTM Faithful](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ctm-faithful)
- [Faithful Glass Doors](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-glass-door)
